title: UPI Intent Payment Instrument
description: Payment instrument for UPI Intent deep link payments. The device operating system determines which UPI apps are available to the buyer — no app targeting or filtering by the platform is permitted per NPCI mandate.

available_upi_intent_instrument.title: Available UPI Intent Payment Instrument
available_upi_intent_instrument.description: Declares UPI Intent instrument availability. No constraints are supported — the OS determines available apps.

display_name.description: Human-readable name for display in platform UI (e.g., 'Pay via UPI'). May be localized (e.g., 'UPI से भुगतान करें').

display_logo.description: HTTPS URL to a UPI logo image for display in platform UI.
